skills.description: Master modern JavaScript with ES6+, async patterns, and Node.js APIs. Handles promises, event loops, and browser/Node compatibility.
trigger_conditions: Building modern JavaScript for Node.js or browsers
Migrating legacy JS to modern ES standards
anti_triggers: You need TypeScript architecture guidance
You are working in a non-JS runtime
The task requires backend architecture decisions

skills.description: Node.js development principles and decision-making. Framework selection, async patterns, security, and architecture.
trigger_conditions: applying security and deployment best practices
anti_triggers: using Express for new edge projects
using sync methods in production code
putting business logic in controllers
skipping input validation
hardcoding secrets
trusting external data without validation
blocking event loop with CPU work

skills.description: Build Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) with offline support, installability, and caching strategies. Trigger whenever the user mentions PWA, service workers, web app manifests, Workbox, 'add to home screen', or wants their web app to work offline, feel native, or be installable.
trigger_conditions: user wants their web app to work offline
anti_triggers: user is not interested in PWAs
user does not mention specific PWA features like service workers or manifests

skills.description: A comprehensive performance optimization guide for React and Next.js applications, maintained by Vercel. Use when writing new React components or Next.js pages, implementing data fetching (client or server-side), or reviewing code for performance issues.
trigger_conditions: Writing new React components or Next.js pages
anti_triggers: When not dealing with React or Next.js applications
For general web development tasks unrelated to performance optimization

skills.description: Diagnose slow React components and suggest targeted performance fixes.
trigger_conditions: user asks to profile or improve a slow React component
or expensive render work in React UI
anti_triggers: not applicable for non-React components
when performance issues are not related to React

skills.description: A specialized workflow for building React and Next.js 14+ applications with modern patterns including App Router, Server Components, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and more.
trigger_conditions: Creating Next.js 14+ projects with App Router
anti_triggers: Legacy React applications
Non-Next.js projects

skills.description: Master modern React state management with Redux Toolkit, Zustand, Jotai, and React Query. Use when setting up global state, managing server state, or choosing between state management solutions.
trigger_conditions: Setting up global state management in a React app
Managing server state with React Query or SWR
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to react state management
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope

skills.description: A comprehensive skill for frontend development using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It includes project scaffolding, component generation, bundle analysis, React patterns, Next.js optimization, and accessibility testing.
trigger_conditions: Scaffolding a new React or Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
Generating new components or custom hooks
Analyzing and optimizing bundle sizes for frontend applications
anti_triggers: Using for backend development tasks
For mobile app development

skills.description: Optimize website and web application performance including loading speed, Core Web Vitals, bundle size, caching strategies, and runtime performance.
trigger_conditions: website or app is loading slowly
anti_triggers: don't optimize blindly - measure first
don't ignore mobile - test on real mobile devices and slow networks
